author: Stavros
body:
I only noticed on the weekend that most Nirvana albums have his name spelt as “Kurdt”. No wonder he had so much angst to give.  
Totally agree Burgo – legends may burn out fast, but the glow lasts forever…

author: Burgo
body:
Hey Stav,  
Thanks for stopping by. “Kurdt” was how Kurt himself used to sign albums sometimes… I can’t quite remember the original story behind that, but I think it had something to do with the fact that his middle name was “Donald” :)

author: Wicked Mike
body: During my protest, i spent a whole day listening to Nirvana, from 1987 demos recorded at home right up to the final box set. Great day!
